diagrams.title: Matching in Graph
diagrams.description: Shows a graph with matched and unmatched vertices
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the concept of matching and identify unmatched vertices for augmenting paths

diagrams.title: Augmenting Path
diagrams.description: Path alternating between matched and unmatched edges from unmatched start to unmatched end
diagrams.purpose: Understand how matching size increases by 1 using augmenting path

diagrams.title: Bipartite Matching
diagrams.description: Two-column representation of bipartite graph with matching
diagrams.purpose: Visualize bipartite matching problems like job assignment

diagrams.title: Hall's Theorem Visualization
diagrams.description: Demonstrates Hall's condition with subset neighborhoods
diagrams.purpose: Understand the necessary and sufficient condition for perfect matching

diagrams.title: Perfect vs Maximum vs Maximal Matching
diagrams.description: Three graphs showing different matching types
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between the three types of matchings
